attributes.visualDNA: Pitch-dark page (near-black) with JetBrains Mono throughout. Headlines are tight monospace 700-weight, no rounding, sharp 2px corners on cards. An electric magenta accent powers links and pull quotes against a high-contrast off-white text. Hacker-zine, brutalist, terminal-inspired — assertive, angular, and aggressively un-precious.

cardInfo.name: Neon Brutalist
cardInfo.summary: JetBrains Mono · near-black page · electric magenta — hacker-zine terminal vibe.
